Areas of Specialization

Six pillars of measurable impact

Areas of Specialization

With 25+ years in quality engineering, I embed quality across the entire SDLC - from planning through to customer feedback.

Quality is not a testing problem - it is an organisational capability. I work with organisations to define quality strategy, build automation capability, and enable teams to own quality as a shared responsibility.

01

Quality Leadership & Strategy

Quality operating models, governance frameworks, and risk-based practices that align quality with business outcomes and delivery confidence.

  • Quality assessments & roadmaps
  • Risk-based test strategy
  • CI/CD quality gates
  • Feedback loop automation
Explore →
02

Test Automation & AI Quality

AI-driven scalable automation for web, mobile, API, desktop, and visual testing - improving reliability across CI/CD pipelines.

  • Future-ready automation frameworks
  • AI-assisted test generation
  • Visual AI testing
  • Test coverage & ROI measurement
Explore →
03

Transformation & Advisory

Quality assessments, roadmaps, and contextual implementation - equally effective in short advisory engagements and full transformation programmes.

  • Current-state assessment
  • Quality operating model design
  • Team structure & capability building
  • Stakeholder alignment
Explore →
04

Training & Enablement

Workshops, bootcamps, and enterprise programmes - training hundreds of professionals on modern automation and AI adoption.

  • 7 structured training programmes
  • Custom team workshops
  • AI-powered automation upskilling
  • Quality metrics & strategy for managers
Explore →
05

Framework & Tool Innovation

Creator of Teswiz, WAAT, and TTA - open-source tools adopted and trusted by the global testing community.

  • Teswiz - end-to-end automation framework
  • WAAT - web analytics automation testing
  • TTA - test trend analyzer
  • Selenium & Appium contributor
View tools →
06

Cross-Functional Improvement

Works across product, engineering, and leadership teams to reduce friction and build scalable, sustainable QA and SDET capability.

  • SDET capability building
  • Process & tooling standardisation
  • Defect leakage reduction
  • Release confidence improvement
See case studies →

Not sure which area fits your challenge? Get in touch - I'll help you figure it out.
